# pr-brief

> ブランチ間差分(<base>...HEAD)を、レビュワー向けの通読可能な読み物(.md)に変換する。git log/diffを集計し、変更サマリ・変更ファイル表・全体像・レビュー論点表・漏れやすい箇所・試してほしいシナリオ・関連ドキュメントの章構成で1本の.mdに仕上げる。単純なdiff整形(diff-review)ではなく意味づけと論点抽出を行う点が特徴。Use for "pr-brief", "PRブリーフィング", "PR解説資料", "レビュー資料化", "変更内容を読み物に", "change-brief", "review-brief", 大きめPR前のレビュー負荷軽減

## Install

### APM (recommended)

```bash
apm install bigdra50/skills/workflow/pr-brief
```

Or declare it in `apm.yml` for a reproducible setup:

```yaml
dependencies:
  apm:
    - bigdra50/skills/workflow/pr-brief
```

then run `apm install`.

### Any agentskills.io-compatible agent

This is an [Agent Skills](https://agentskills.io) skill — a portable
`SKILL.md` folder that works with Claude Code, Codex, opencode, Gemini CLI,
Cursor, and other [compatible agents](https://agentskills.io/clients).

With the [`skills`](https://github.com/vercel-labs/skills) CLI (installs into
every detected agent's skills directory):

```bash
npx skills add bigdra50/skills --skill pr-brief
```

Or copy the folder in directly:

```bash
npx degit bigdra50/skills/workflow/pr-brief ~/.claude/skills/pr-brief
```

See [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md) for what this skill does and when to use it.
